item.title: Doc Pay Boosted $400 Million With New Medicare Billing Code
item.description: A new JAMA study shows that a new Medicare billing code may have benefited specialists more than the primary care physicians it was designed to help m...

item.title: Australia’s Medicare Reforms Face Rural Stress Test
item.description: A parliamentary committee has launched an inquiry into the rural impacts of changes aimed at strengthening Medicare access and funding. Experts offer ...

item.title: COVID Vaccination Reduces Risk for Preeclampsia
item.description: The vaccine plus a booster dose reduces the odds of preeclampsia by 30% and by as much as 58% in those with preexisting morbidities. Medscape Medical ...

item.title: Unmarried Older Adults Face Increased Humerus Fracture Risk
item.description: Older adults of Norwegian origin and those who are unmarried face an increased risk for humerus fractures, with a higher incidence seen in winter than...

item.title: Booster Shots Reduce Risk for Severe COVID Outcomes
item.description: According to a study of more than 5.5 million adults aged 50 years or older, vaccination with the bivalent BA.1 mRNA booster lowers risks for COVID-re...
